title: Digital Pet Simulator
description: Create a Pet class with hunger and happiness levels.
problemStatement:
Welcome to the world of objects! Create a `Pet` class to model a digital animal.

1. Attributes: `name`, `hunger` (start at 50).
2. Method `feed(amount)`: decreases hunger by `amount`.
3. Method `__str__`: Should return a message like `"Pet [name] has hunger level [hunger]"`.

Create an instance named `my_pet`, feed it `20`, and print the result.
hints: Use `self` inside your methods to refer to the object's attributes.
The `__init__` method is where you should define the `name` and starting `hunger`.
